summary: A clip from a Fox News segment. One portion shows a wall of social-media photographs of two women in various poses, including snapshots with a small dog, a helicopter and outdoor settings, under the banner ICE ARRESTS SLAIN IRGC GENERAL'S FAMILY IN L.A. A second portion shows a reporter with long hair speaking to camera in front of rows of international flags at the State Department, with the banner RUBIO REVOKES VISAS AND GREEN CARDS OF IRANIAN NATIONALS WITH TIES TO TEHRAN.

script.scene: A wall of social-media photos of two women appears under the banner ICE ARRESTS SLAIN IRGC GENERAL'S FAMILY IN L.A.
A reporter speaks in front of international flags; banner reads RUBIO REVOKES VISAS AND GREEN CARDS OF IRANIAN NATIONALS WITH TIES TO TEHRAN.
